revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Volume needed}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | title = This citation requires a reference to the specific volume in which the source appears. | text = {{#if:{{{volume|{{{vol|{{{v|}}}}}}}}}|issue|{{#if:{{{issue|{{{iss|{{{i|}}}}}}}}}|volume|volume & issue}} }} needed | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = {{#if:{{{c|}}}|[[Category:Comics articles needing issue citations]]|[[Category:All articles with unsourced statements]]}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with unsourced statements}}<!--{{Volume needed}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Please add this template's categories to the /doc subpage - thanks! --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Volume needed}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Citing sources | title = This citation requires a reference to the specific volume in which the source appears. | text = {{#if:{{{volume|{{{vol|{{{v|}}}}}}}}}|issue|{{#if:{{{issue|{{{iss|{{{i|}}}}}}}}}|volume|volume & issue}} }} needed | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = {{#if:{{{c|}}}|[[Category:Comics articles needing issue citations]]|[[Category:All articles with unsourced statements]]}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with unsourced statements}}<!--{{Volume needed}} end--> }}<noinclude> <!-- Please add this template's categories to the /doc subpage - thanks! --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
